commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a70c59f89753385df76c37cde0a61a4580a21603)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds up to three attempts with incremental delays when the shared memory-wiki imported-source writer receives an `FsSafeError` with code `path-alias`.

PR surface: Source +25. Total +25 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the linked report's concurrent replacement path maps to `path-mismatch` in the published dependency contract. The contributor did not execute the live race, so it was not dynamically reproduced during this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocking defect is concrete and can be repaired by targeting the actual `path-mismatch` race with focused concurrency coverage.

target.title: #92134: fix(memory-wiki): retry transient path-alias errors during source page write
target.author: zhangqueping

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
